<!-- Thanks for contributing to LegendCTL. Please keep pull requests focused on a single change. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related Issue, e.g. "Fixes #123". -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation or problem being solved. -->

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover tests -p "test_*.py"` passes locally
- [ ] Tested on real hardware (note controller variant + firmware) — or N/A for docs/build-only changes
- [ ] No new network calls, drivers, virtual devices, input injection, automation/macros, or telemetry (these are out of scope by design — see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are limited to the stated scope
- [ ] Docs/comments updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No private paths, secrets, or personal data added to tracked files
